examples: You can prepare glutinous rice flour in a bowl and slowly add hot water until they mix into a dough.
Eating yuanxiao (sweet dumplings made of glutinous rice flour) is one of the special traditions of the Lantern Festival.
Sweet dumpling is small dumpling balls made of glutinous rice flour with rose petals, sesame, walnut meat, dried fruit, sugar.
Its novel menu has featured items such as steamed glutinous rice with duck jus.
Cheap, abundant, varied and delicious, festival food carts supply a delicious selection of all things fried, grilled and glutinous.
